prayer_timeout.description: Prayer timeout (ublesscnt) controls when you can safely pray again.
prayer_timeout.initial_value: Set by previous prayer or sacrifice outcomes.

resets_to.after_pleased: rnz(350) base, plus rnz(1000) per kick_on_butt factor (demigod status, crowned)

decreases_by.sacrifice: value * (500 for chaotic, 300 for others) / MAXVALUE(24), subtracted from ublesscnt

prayer_timeout.notes: ublesscnt decrements by 1 each turn naturally.

safe_prayer_requires_all: ublesscnt <= 0 (or <= 100 for minor trouble, <= 200 for major trouble)
On coaligned altar or no altar
Not undead (unless chaotic, or in Gehennom)

p_type_values.-1: Undead praying to lawful/neutral god outside Gehennom. God turns you, deals rnd(20) damage, forces rehumanize.
p_type_values.0: Too soon. Timeout not expired. God gets upset, adds rnz(250) to timeout, -3 luck.
p_type_values.1: Naughty. Negative luck, god angry, or negative alignment. Triggers angrygods().
p_type_values.2: On non-coaligned altar. If water on altar, curses it and god gets upset. Otherwise pleased().
p_type_values.3: Safe. Coaligned altar or no altar, all conditions met. Grants invulnerability during prayer, calls pleased().

prayer_safety_conditions.invulnerability: p_type==3 and not in Gehennom grants invulnerability during the 3-turn prayer.

major_troubles.description: Checked in priority order. Positive trouble values. Guaranteed fix if Luck >= 0.

list.condition: Critically low HP (<=5 or HP/maxHP ratio)
list.fix: Full heal, possibly raise maxHP by rnd(5)
Restore STR to max, uncurse sustain ability ring
Teleport out, or grant temporary phasing

minor_troubles.description: Negative trouble values. Fixed only with higher prayer_luck or DEVOUT alignment.

list.condition: Punished (ball and chain) or buried ball
list.fix: Remove chain, free from buried ball

list.condition: Cursed gauntlets of fumbling or fumble boots
Blinded > 1 (not from engulfer) or timed deafness

pleased_action_resolution.description: When god is pleased, action level determines what gets fixed.
pleased_action_resolution.action_formula: action = rn1(prayer_luck + (on_altar ? 3 + on_shrine : 2), 1); capped at 3 if not on altar
pleased_action_resolution.low_alignment_override: If alignment < STRIDENT(4): action = 1 if record > 0 or 50% chance, else 0

action_effects.1: Fix worst trouble if major (positive value).
action_effects.2: Fix all major troubles (up to 10 iterations).
action_effects.3: Fix worst trouble even if minor.
action_effects.5: Fix all troubles + gratuitous favor (pat on head).

effects.2: Golden glow: restore lost levels (or +5 maxHP), full heal, restore STR, cure hunger, fix luck, cure blindness.
effects.3: Castle tune hint (first time) or tune itself (second time). Falls through to 2 if already known.
effects.4: Uncurse entire inventory (except helm of opposite alignment).
effects.5: Grant intrinsic: telepathy > speed > stealth > protection (in that priority).
effects.7-8: Crowning (if PIOUS alignment and not already crowned). Otherwise spellbook.

crowning.description: Highest prayer reward. Grants title, intrinsics, and possibly an artifact weapon.
crowning.requirements: alignment record >= PIOUS(20), not already crowned

gifts.lawful: Excalibur (if wielding long sword) or spellbook of Finger of Death (wizard) / Restore Ability (monk)
gifts.neutral: Vorpal Blade (if no artifact weapon wielded)

crowning.additional: Weapon blessed, erodeproofed, spe raised to at least +1. Extra weapon skill slot granted.

corpse_value.freshness_required: monstermoves <= corpse_age + 50 (or acid blob, which never rots for sacrifice purposes)
corpse_value.eaten_penalty: If partly eaten, value reduced proportionally via eaten_stat()

modifiers.undead_corpse: +1 value if you are not chaotic
modifiers.unicorn_your_alignment_on_cross_altar: Conversion trigger. alignment record set to -1.

effects_when_value_positive.god_angry: Reduce ugangr by value * (2 for chaotic, 3 for others) / MAXVALUE
effects_when_value_positive.negative_alignment: Add value to alignment record (partial absolution)
effects_when_value_positive.timeout_remaining: Reduce ublesscnt by value * (500 chaotic, 300 others) / MAXVALUE
effects_when_value_positive.good_standing: Chance of artifact gift: !rn2(10 + 2*ugifts*nartifacts). Otherwise luck boost: value*LUCKMAX/(MAXVALUE*2).

human_sacrifice.chaotic_on_chaotic_altar: +5 alignment, +2 luck, may summon demon lord
human_sacrifice.non_chaotic: -5 alignment, +3 god anger, -1 WIS, -5 luck, angers own god
human_sacrifice.demon_player: Finds it satisfying, gains WIS exercise

conversion.condition: Sacrificing on cross-aligned altar while your god is angry and you haven't previously converted
conversion.effect: Change alignment to altar's, -3 luck, +300 to prayer timeout

god_anger.ugangr: Counter for how angry your god is. Incremented by gods_upset(), decremented by sacrifice.

rn2_maxanger_outcomes.6: Punished (ball and chain). Falls to 4-5 if already punished.
rn2_maxanger_outcomes.9+: God zaps you: lightning bolt then wide-angle disintegration beam. Can destroy armor.

alignment_thresholds.description: Alignment record thresholds that affect prayer outcomes and god messages.

gehennom.description: Praying in Gehennom always fails. God can't help you. Likely angrygods() if low alignment or unlucky roll.

water_prayer.description: If praying on an altar with potions of water on the floor, they become holy (coaligned) or unholy (non-coaligned) water.
